name: &RThe &RF&rl&Ya&ym&Yi&rn&Rg T&rh&Yro&rn&Re&n
description:
You come in a large room, all is in fire!  , you see a huge throne in the
middle of the room, in fire too!  , your skins burn when you approaches the
room!  Muhahaha, the huge flaming skeleton is standing up of the throne and is
coming to you, its best you flee from here.

exits.description: The chapel door is made of old bone.
